teaching.role: Teaching Assistant, Organic Chemistry I & Lab
teaching.description: Mentored 120+ undergraduates; developed supplemental materials improving exam performance by 15%.

summary: PhD chemist/materials scientist with 6+ years in chemical/materials process development, DOE-guided optimization, SOP-ready controls, and characterization of polymer and thin-film systems. Experienced translating process variables into material-quality metrics, validation criteria, technical reports, and scale-up specifications for reproducible production transfer.

bullets: Lead DOE-guided bio-based polymer process development, establishing critical process variables, material-quality readouts, reproducible operating windows, and scale-up-ready specifications.
Convert analytical and thermal-characterization data into SOP-ready controls, technical reports, and troubleshooting logic for process improvement.
Designed and executed hypothesis-driven experiments across 15+ material variants, diagnosing performance/degradation trends and proposing next-step process or material-design decisions.
Integrated multi-technique characterization outputs into clear technical conclusions for cross-functional R&D stakeholders.
Co-led AFOSR-funded thin-film coating process development, linking CVD/surface preparation to morphology, interface quality, optical performance, and reproducible process controls.
Developed and optimized CVD polymer thin-film deposition with DOE strategies and in-situ QCM-D monitoring to quantify growth kinetics and coating reproducibility.

Managed characterization/process-development lab operations for a 15-member group; implemented calibration, SOP, safety, and equipment-tracking systems that improved instrument uptime by 30% and strengthened data quality.

projects.title: Bio-Based Polymer Process Qualification
projects.description: Defined DOE-guided process windows, analytical readouts, reproducibility criteria, and SOP-ready material-quality specifications for polymer scale-up.
projects.tech: DOE, SPC, TGA/DSC, spectroscopy, process documentation

projects.title: AFOSR Defense Thin-Film Coatings
projects.description: Established process-property relationships for CVD/surface-preparation workflows and reproducible high-performance coating conditions.
projects.tech: CVD, QCM-D, surface prep, thin films

projects.title: Materials Reliability and Failure-Mode Study
projects.description: Mapped degradation, redox instability, and performance failure modes across functional material variants using orthogonal characterization and stress-test logic.
projects.tech: FT-IR, UV-Vis-NIR, CV, TGA/DSC, NMR, GPC, MS

skills.Chemical & Materials Process Development: DOE, process windows, process qualification, validation-style protocols, SOPs, work instructions, technical reports, reproducibility studies
skills.Polymer/Formulated Materials: Bio-based polymers, thin films, coatings, surface functionalization, structure-property-processing relationships, stability-sensitive materials
skills.Characterization & Quality Readouts: FT-IR, UV-Vis-NIR, TGA, DSC, GPC/SEC, LC-MS, GC-MS, NMR, QCM-D, cyclic voltammetry, pH/solution preparation experience
skills.Statistical & Production Controls: SPC, JMP (basic), Python (basic), Excel, control-plan thinking, out-of-trend investigation, root-cause troubleshooting
skills.Cross-Functional Execution: Supplier/process issue communication, lab safety, calibration tracking, equipment coordination, stakeholder reporting
